tools.name: ai_research_message
tools.description: Send one conversational AI research message to ABCompass and keep the session state.

message.description: The latest user message in the current research conversation.

session_id.description: Optional explicit session id. If omitted, the tool reuses local session state.

research_method.description: Optional preferred research method for the first round.

language.description: Optional output language passed to ABCompass.

api_key.description: Optional AI Research API Key for first-time binding or explicit override.

source_channel.description: Optional source channel override. Defaults to skill in the AgentKit wrapper.

request_kind.description: Optional structured intent for this turn, such as new_request, revise, confirm_execute, query_status, query_result, query_plan, or expand_plan_detail.

industry_hint.description: Optional normalized industry resolved by the host model before calling the backend. Must be one of the directly executable industries.

normalized_message.description: Optional rewritten message that keeps the original intent but normalizes the industry/product wording before backend execution.

host_capabilities.description: Optional host capability declaration used to negotiate rendering and follow-up actions.

response_mode.description: Optional backend response mode. Claw should default to sync_deferred instead of stream.

status_only.description: Query /survey/skill/status directly for the current session instead of sending a new conversational turn.

force_new_session.description: Start a fresh research conversation instead of continuing the current session.
